name: Nightfall AI
description: Integrates with Nightfall AI Developer API v3 for real-time sensitive data scanning, DLP detection across text and files, and custom detector management

actions.name: Scan Text
actions.description: Scan text strings for sensitive data using configured detection rules and policies for PII, PHI, PCI, secrets, and custom patterns

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: JSON array of text strings to scan for sensitive data

parameters.name: policyUUIDs
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of policy UUIDs to apply for detection

parameters.name: detectionRuleUUIDs
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of detection rule UUIDs to apply

actions.name: Scan File
actions.description: Initiate a file scan for sensitive data supporting documents, spreadsheets, images, and archives

parameters.name: fileUrl
parameters.description: URL of the file to scan

parameters.name: policyUUID
parameters.description: Policy UUID to apply for detection

parameters.name: requestMetadata
parameters.description: JSON metadata to associate with the scan request

actions.name: Get File Scan Results
actions.description: Retrieve the results of a previously initiated file scan including findings and match details

parameters.name: scanId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the file scan

actions.name: List Detectors
actions.description: Retrieve all available detectors including built-in and custom detectors for sensitive data identification

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured detection policies with their associated rules and actions

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve findings from previous scans with filtering by detector type, confidence level, and date range

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for findings query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for findings query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: detectorUUID
parameters.description: Filter findings by specific detector UUID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of findings to return
